name: Maple Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk and rice in a large saucepan.
2. Cook, stirring, over medium-low heat until the mixture boils and thickens, about 25 minutes.
3. Stir in 1/3 cup maple syrup and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Add the orange rind and vanilla to the pudding.
5. Pour into 4 (8-ounce) dessert bowls or custard cups.
6. Heat the walnuts in a small heavy frying pan over low heat, stirring until fragrant, about 3 minutes.
7. Drizzle with the remaining 2 tablespoons maple syrup.
8. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the syrup boils and coats the walnuts, about 2 minutes.
9. Sprinkle the walnuts on top of the puddings.
